title: Multi table of contents and courseware generation
abstract: A customized table of contents for a course may be generated based off the needs of the teacher and/or the interests of the students. Core content for the course may be organized in a plurality of sections, e.g., chapters, topics, projects and/or reading assignments, with each section being broken down into one or more alternative blocks. The plurality of sections and alternative blocks may be stored in a database. Using answers from the teacher and/or determined interest of the students, the customized table of contents may be generated for the course. Current events may also be used in selecting and/or modifying alternative blocks for the course. Success rates from previously tried customized table of contents may be analyzed and feedback provided to the teacher in future courses to assist the teacher in creating better customized table of contents in the future.
claims: Claims CLAIMS The invention claimed is: 1 . A system for creating a customized table of contents for a course, comprising: a database, operating on one or more hardware servers, storing a core content for the course, wherein the core content comprises a plurality of sections and each section in the plurality of sections comprises one or more alternative blocks, wherein a first section and a second section in the plurality of sections comprise a different number of alternative blocks, wherein the first section comprises a first alternative block and a second alternative block and wherein the core content comprises content for a plurality of different possible table of contents; a teacher interrogatory engine, operating on the one or more hardware servers, comprising a computer processing unit to select a first question and a second question, wherein the teacher interrogatory engine is configured to display the first question and receive a first answer and display the second question and receive a second answer to and from a client device operated by a teacher; and a table of contents generator, operating on the one or more hardware servers, comprising an input to receive the first answer and the second answer and an output to transmit the customized table of contents to the client device operated by the teacher, wherein the first answer is used to select the first alternative block in the first section and the second answer is used to modify the first alternative block in the first section, wherein the customized table of contents comprises one and only one alternative block from each section in the plurality of sections and wherein the customized table of contents comprises the modified first alternative block in the first section. 2. The system of claim 1 , further comprising: a success rate analyzer, operating on the one or more hardware servers, configured to: store in the database a success rate and the customized table of contents for a student that took the course. 3. The system of claim 1 , further comprising: a success rate analyzer, operating on the one or more hardware servers, configured to: analyze a plurality of success rates and associated customized table of contents from a plurality of students, and notify the teacher via the client device as to which customized table of contents yield higher success rates over other customized table of contents for the course. 4. The system of claim 1 , wherein the first question and the second question are stored in the database with the core content. 5. The system of claim 1 , wherein the second question is selected based on the first answer to the first question. 6. The system of claim 1 , wherein the first question or the second question comprises a multiple choice question. 7. The system of claim 1 , wherein a plurality of alternative blocks are selected for the customized table of contents based on the first answer. 8. A method for creating a customized table of contents for a course, comprising the steps of: storing a core content for the course in a database operating on one or more servers, wherein the core content comprises a plurality of sections and each section in the plurality of sections comprises one or more alternative blocks, wherein a first section and a second section in the plurality of sections comprise a different number of alternative blocks, wherein the first section comprises a first alternative block and a second alternative block and wherein the core content comprises content for a plurality of different possible table of contents; displaying a first question and receiving a first answer and displaying a second question and receiving a second answer by a teacher interrogatory engine, operating on the one or more servers, to and from a client device operated by a teacher; receiving by an input of a table of contents generator, operating on the one or more servers, the first answer and the second answer from the teacher interrogatory engine, operating on the one or more servers and wherein the first answer is used to select the first alternative block in the first section and the second answer is used to modify the first alternative block in the first section; and transmitting by an output of the table of contents generator the customized table of contents to the client device operated by the teacher, wherein the customized table of contents comprises one and only one alternative block from each section in the plurality of sections and wherein the customized table of contents comprises the modified first alternative block in the first section. 9. The method of claim 8, further comprising the step of: storing in the database by a success rate analyzer operating on the one or more servers a success rate and the customized table of contents for a student that took the course. 10. The method of claim 8, further comprising the steps of: analyzing by a success rate analyzer a plurality of success rates and associated customized table of contents from a plurality of students; and notifying by the success rate analyzer the teacher via the client device as to which customized table of contents yield higher success rates over other customized table of contents for the course. 1 1 . The method of claim 8, wherein the first question and the second question are stored in the database with the core content. 12. The method of claim 8, wherein the second question is selected based on the first answer to the first question. 13. The method of claim 8, wherein the first question or the second question comprises a multiple choice question. 14. The method of claim 8, wherein a plurality of alternative blocks are selected for the customized table of contents based on the first answer. 15. A method for creating a customized table of contents for a course, comprising the steps of: storing a core content for the course in a database operating on one or more servers, wherein the core content comprises a plurality of sections and each section in the plurality of sections comprises one or more alternative blocks, wherein a first section and a second section in the plurality of sections comprise a different number of alternative blocks, wherein the first section comprises a first alternative block and a second alternative block and wherein the core content comprises content for a plurality of different possible table of contents; displaying a first question and receiving a first answer and displaying a second question and receiving a second answer by a teacher interrogatory engine, operating on the one or more servers, to and from a client device operated by a teacher; receiving by an input of a table of contents generator, operating on the one or more servers, the first answer and the second answer from the teacher interrogatory engine, operating on the one or more servers and wherein the first answer is used to select the first alternative block in the first section and the second answer is used to modify the first alternative block in the first section; parsing by a current events detector, operating on the one or more servers, a plurality of current event records to determine a current event relevant to the first alternative block in the first section; modifying by the current events detector the first alternative block in the first section based on the current event determined by the current events detector; and transmitting by an output of the table of contents generator the customized table of contents to the client device operated by the teacher, wherein the customized table of contents comprises one and only one alternative block from each section in the plurality of sections, wherein the customized table of contents comprises the modified first alternative block in the first section and wherein the modified first alternative block in the first section was modified based on the second answer and modified based on the current event determined by the current events detector. 16. The method of claim 15, further comprising the steps of: storing in the database by a success rate analyzer operating on the one or more servers a success rate and the customized table of contents for each student that takes the course; analyzing by the success rate analyzer a plurality of success rates and associated customized table of contents from a plurality of students; and notifying by the success rate analyzer the teacher via the client device as to which customized table of contents yield higher success rates over other customized table of contents for the course. 17. The method of claim 15, wherein the first question and the second question are stored in the database with the core content. 18. The method of claim 15, wherein the second question is selected based on the first answer to the first question. 19. The method of claim 15, wherein the first question or the second question comprises a multiple choice question. 20. The method of claim 15, wherein a plurality of alternative blocks are selected for the customized table of contents based on the first answer.
